title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MESALIPIT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BACOLOR, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3887 / 52 OG No. 9, 4202 (August 16, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1519, June 16, 1956 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MESALIPIT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF BACOLOR, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Mesalipit in the Municipality of Bacolor, Province of Pampanga, is hereby constituted into a barrio in the said municipality, to be known as the barrio of Mesalipit.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 16, 1956.
